title: SAO Particles
description: A mod that spawns particles when mobs die, just like in SAO!
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This is a simple mod that spawns death particles around mobs when they die, just like in the SAO anime.

The amount of particles is proportional to the size of the mob and will be costumizable in the future.

 

Recommendations
Use a No Damage Heart Resource Pack to get rid of the damage hearts.


Gamerules
You can use the gamerule saoParticlesSound to enable/disable the sound effect that comes with the particles.

You can use the gamerule doBodySpawns to enable/disable the bodies of the mobs after they die, can be helpful in some cases, like with Ice and Fire dragons.

 

If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
